positive: A symmetrical, intricate celestial forest composition featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and gently flowing nebula patterns. Central subject is a highly detailed, geometric mountain silhouette partially overgrown with glowing, abstract vines and stylized constellations. Use a highly contrasting monochrome palette with a subtle pop of electric sapphire blue and deep emerald green accents for the bioluminescence. Composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for clothing prints. Style should be minimalist yet ornate, reminiscent of Art Deco linework combined with stained-glass etching. Crisp vector art quality, deep black background, strong clean silhouettes, extreme detail, symmetrical radial arrangement, overhead view.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, low detail, ugly, mutated, poorly drawn anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale only
